description:
**[CRITICAL CLEANUP]**

Per FRAC-21 §H3: `prefers-reduced-motion` is honored in exactly one place. Everything else animates regardless of the user's preference.

## What ignores reduced-motion

- `src/components/ui/FadeIn.tsx:28-44` — Framer-Motion entrance animation, used site-wide via `SectorHeader` and direct calls. **Highest impact offender.**
- `src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx:796-800` — octahedron auto-rotation
- `OctahedronHero.tsx:249-253` — scrolling "THE PROTOCOL" edge-text texture offsets
- `OctahedronHero.tsx:561-567` — center scale-breathing
- `OctahedronHero.tsx:656-663` — node scale-pulse (only the emissive glow respects the pref, at `:638-677`)
- `src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx:128,345` — scroll/overlay motion
- `src/components/sections/SierpinskiCarpet.tsx:230-241,251-264` — resize and animation RAF loops
- `src/index.css:169-176` — `@keyframes blink` / `.animate-blink` (unused but if revived, no guard)

## Action

Add reduced-motion guards. Existing pattern in `OctahedronHero.tsx:32-45` (`usePrefersReducedMotion` hook) is reusable; extract it to `src/hooks/usePrefersReducedMotion.ts` and consume across the targets above.

For Framer Motion `FadeIn`: when reduced-motion is true, skip the entrance animation (render the final state directly).

For R3F loops: skip the rotation delta / texture offset update.

For Navbar motion: short-circuit or fast-forward the transitions.

## Acceptance criteria

- The shared hook lives at `src/hooks/usePrefersReducedMotion.ts`
- FadeIn renders without animation when reduced-motion is on
- Octahedron auto-rotation, edge-text scroll, scale-breathing, node scale-pulse all halt under reduced-motion
- Navbar scroll motion respects the pref
- SierpinskiCarpet animation halts (resize listener stays)
- Manual smoke test in macOS System Settings → Accessibility → Reduce motion

## Cites
FRAC-21 synthesis §H3
title: [Cleanup] prefers-reduced-motion coverage: FadeIn + octahedron rotation/edge-text/breathing + Navbar scroll + SierpinskiCarpet + blink
